name: process-flow
prompt: Simple process flow visualization. White background. Five rectangles in a horizontal line, connected by thin grey arrows. Rectangles contain: "Define", "Research", "Design", "Build", "Deploy". All rectangles are borderless, just text. The "Build" rectangle text is in ember orange (#D95B43), others in charcoal. Below the entire flow, small grey text: "Iterative • Agile • Data-Driven". Minimal Inter font. Generous white space.
